coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
有狐綏綏，在彼淇梁，心之憂矣，之子無裳。
有狐綏綏，在彼淇厲，心之憂矣，之子無帶。
有狐綏綏，在彼淇側，心之憂矣，之子無服。
translation_text:
1 There is a fox, solitary and suspicious,
At that dam over the K4e.
My heart is sad ; —
That man has no lower garment.

2 There is a fox, solitary and suspicious.
At that deep ford of the K4e.
That man has no girdle.
There is a fox, solitary and suspicious,
By the side there of the K4e.
My heart is sad ; —
man has no clothes.
